_note: 2026-07-09: codex primary, claude-code/claude-sonnet-5 fallback. The A3 rate-limit skip auto-advances a rung whose provider errors with 'usage limit'/'429'/'quota' — so when codex is exhausted (resets ~11:56 AM), targets fall through to sonnet and keep grinding; when codex is available it cracks at rung 0. glm/deepseek dropped (Jul-2 run died on '402 Insufficient Balance' / 'No API key'). decompStyleRule / repair-to-clean still enforced by the worker.
